creator: jharris@widomaker.com
text:
Right, is Poudriere a strict requirement?  This is the second failure:

  %sudo poudriere ports -c -m svn+https -p subversion
  [00:00:00] ====>> Creating subversion fs... done
  [00:00:01] ====>> Checking out the ports tree...svn: E000060: Error retrieving REPORT: Operation timed out
  [03:52:29] ====>> Error:  fail
  [03:52:29] ====>> Error while creating ports tree, cleaning up.

Honestly, it shouldn't cleanup after this, but allow "svn co" restarts...
